steps.explanation: The number of zeros tells us how many places to move the decimal.

steps.instruction: Move the decimal point 2 places to the right.
steps.explanation: Each zero in the power of 10 moves the decimal one place right.
Multiplying by 100 makes the number 100 times larger.
We will move the decimal 3 places to the right.

steps.instruction: Move the decimal 3 places right. Add zeros if needed.
steps.explanation: After the first move we get 23, but we need 2 more moves. We add zeros: 230, then 2300.
Multiplying by 1000 moves the decimal 3 places right.
